top_signals.title: A Catholic Security Scholar’s Case for Responsible Military AI
top_signals.summary:
What do you do when two identities that make up your deepest self find themselves on opposite sides of a moral and spiritual battlefield?I am Catholic. I have been one for over 20 years since I made the life-altering decision to join a friend for Mass one day. My faith became a spiritual and ethical foundation at a time I sorely needed it, so much so that for a time, I contemplated entering the priesthood, which replaced my previous career goal of entering the CIA. I eventually realized that teaching was my true calling and decided to pursue that path

The post A Catholic Security Scholar’s Case for Responsible Military AI appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.title: Commission partially greenlights Spain's sixth payment request for €5.7 billion under NextGenerationEU*
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 03 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission partially greenlighted Spain's sixth payment request worth €5.7 billion under the Recovery and Resilience Facility, the centrepiece of NextGenerationEU. At the same time, it has greenlighted a payment for two milestones suspended earlier under the fifth payment request.
